name: AQUAGUARD SELECT DESIGNO UTC RO+UV 2X
description: A premium under-the-counter water purifier featuring advanced RO+UV technology with a 9-stage purification process. It boasts a 7-liter storage capacity, handles TDS levels up to 2,000 mg/L, and offers an impressive filter life of 12,000 liters.

specs.Included in the Box: Water Purifier, Mega Sediment Filter, Accessory (Faucet, Input pipe, Reject water pipe, Diverter valve & Warranty Card), TDS Meter
specs.Purification Modules: Prefilter, Sedi-Filter, Chemi Block, Reverse Osmosis Cartridge, UV e boiling, Active Copper Booster Cartridge, Calcium and Magnesium

name: AQUAGUARD SELECT DESIGNO UTC UV+UF 2X
description: This under-the-counter UV+UF purifier provides 8-stage purification suitable for municipal water. It comes with a 7-liter storage tank, handles TDS up to 2,000 mg/L, and features a long-lasting filter life of 12,000 liters.

specs.Included in the Box: Water Purifier, Mega Sediment Filter, Accessory (Faucet, Input pipe, Reject water pipe, Diverter valve & Warranty Card), TDS Meter
specs.Purification Modules: Prefilter, Sedi-Filter, Chemi Block, Reverse Osmosis Cartridge, UV e boiling, Active Copper Booster Cartridge, Calcium and Magnesium

name: AQUAGUARD ASPIRE SLIMTECH UV STG 2X
description: A slim, wall-mounted UV purifier designed for municipal water with TDS up to 200 mg/L. It offers a 4-liter storage capacity, 5th Gen UV LED technology, and Active Copper enhancement, all with a 12,000-liter filter life.

specs.Included in the Box: 1N Water Purifier, 1N Pre Filter Assy, 1N Warranty Card, 1N Installation Kit
specs.Purification Modules: Pre filter, I-Filter, Chemi-Block, Active Copper with Zinc Booster Cartridge, UV Reactor

name: AQUAGUARD SLIM GLASS UV BAR INLINE 2X
description: An ultra-sleek, tankless inline UV purifier with a premium glass exterior. Ideal for municipal water (TDS up to 200 mg/L), it features 7-stage purification, 5th Gen UV LED, and Active Copper technology.

specs.Included In The Box: Water Purifier, Accessory (Input pipe, Diverter valve & Warranty Card)

description: A high-performance RO+UV water purifier featuring a durable stainless steel tank. It delivers advanced multi-stage purification with active copper technology, ensuring safe and mineral-rich drinking water.

name: AQUAGUARD ASPIRE NOVA UV+UF+SS 2X
description: This UV+UF purifier combines advanced multi-stage filtration with the hygiene of a stainless steel storage tank. It effectively removes impurities while retaining essential minerals for your family.

name: AQUAGUARD ASPIRE NOVA RO+UV 2X
description: An efficient RO+UV water purifier equipped with smart TDS adjustment and a food-grade plastic storage tank. It ensures comprehensive purification and safe drinking water for all sources.

name: AQUAGUARD ASPIRE NOVA UV+UF 2X
description: A reliable UV+UF water purifier designed for municipal water sources. It features a high-quality food-grade plastic storage tank and advanced filtration technology for safe, everyday drinking water.

name: AQUAGUARD ENRICH VECTOR RO+UV+MC 2X

description: This RO+UV purifier features advanced alkaline boost technology to balance your water's pH levels. It effectively purifies water while preserving essential minerals for enhanced antioxidant benefits.

name: FORBES AIR PURIFIER 355 SURROUND 360° SM
description: A smart, 4-stage air purifier featuring True H13 HEPA and Plasma filtration. Designed for living rooms up to 480 sq. ft., it delivers an air flow of 355 m³/hr with real-time PM 2.5 monitoring.

specs.Stages of Purification: Pre filter, Activated Carbon Filter, True H13 HEPA filter, Plasma filtration
specs.Fan Speeds: Fan speed can be changed from 1 to 12
specs.Timer setting: Timer can be set for 1 to 12 Hrs
specs.Ideal For: Living Room up to 480 sq. feet

name: FORBES AIR PURIFIER 500 SURROUND 360° SM
description: A powerful air purifier ideal for large spaces up to 670 sq. ft. It provides a high air flow of 500 m³/hr through 4-stage True H13 HEPA and Plasma filtration, complete with a smart touch interface.

specs.Stages of Purification: Pre filter, Activated Carbon Filter, True H13 HEPA filter, Plasma filtration
specs.Fan Speeds: Fan speed can be changed from 1 to 12
specs.Timer setting: Timer can be set for 1 to 12 Hrs
specs.Ideal For: Entire Home up to 670 sq. feet

name: FORBES AIR PURIFIER 270 SURROUND 360°
description: Designed for rooms up to 365 sq. ft., this purifier uses True H13 HEPA and Ionizer technology to clean your air. It features an air flow of 270 m³/hr, a sensor touch panel, and multi-speed settings.

specs.Purification Stages: Pre filter, Activated Carbon Filter, True H13 HEPA filter, Ionizer
specs.Timer setting: Timer can be set for 2 HR, 4 HR, 6 HR, 8 HR
specs.Ideal For: Large Room up to 365 sq. feet

name: FORBES AIR PURIFIER 230 SURROUND 360°
description: A compact and efficient air purifier for medium rooms up to 310 sq. ft. It delivers an air flow of 230 m³/hr with True H13 HEPA and Ionizer filtration, controllable via a sleek touch interface.

specs.Purification Stages: Pre filter, Activated Carbon Filter, True H13 HEPA filter, Ionizer
specs.Timer setting: Timer can be set for 2 HR, 4 HR, 6 HR, 8 HR
specs.Ideal For: Medium Room up to 310 sq. feet

name: FORBES ATOM
description: A lightweight and handy 600W vacuum cleaner with a 0.5-liter dust capacity. It comes with 7 versatile accessories including floor brushes and crevice nozzles for efficient daily cleanups.

specs.Included in the Box: 7 (Hose pipe, extension tubes, floor and carpet brush, crevice nozzle and multipurpose brush, inflator, 2 in 1 brush)

name: FORBES SELECT WD X2
description: A heavy-duty 1300W wet and dry vacuum cleaner boasting an 8-liter dust capacity. It features auto-clean technology, dynamic power control, and a comprehensive set of cleaning accessories.

specs.Convenience Feature: Auto clean, Dynamic dial power control, Intelligent dust bag indicator, Smart LED indicator, Wet and dry
specs.Accessory Modules: Floor Brush, Carpet Brush, Corner Cleaner, All Surface Cleaner, Hose Pipe, Aromiser, Car Wash Adapter, Flexi Cleaner, 3 Extension Tubes, and Floor Wet Squeegee

name: FORBES CORDLESS ZEROBEND Z15
description: A versatile 450W cordless vacuum offering up to 40 minutes of runtime. It delivers powerful 150 Air Watts of suction in turbo mode with a lightweight design that eliminates the need to bend.

specs.Run Time: Up to 40 minutes in Eco mode

name: FORBES CORDLESS ZEROBEND Z21WM
description: A high-performance 550W cordless vacuum that provides up to 60 minutes of runtime. It generates an impressive 210 Air Watts of suction, perfect for deep cleaning across all home surfaces.

specs.Run Time: Up to 60 minutes in Eco mode

name: FORBES SMARTCLEAN FULLYAUTOMATIC STATION
description: An advanced robotic vacuum featuring a fully automatic docking station. It offers powerful 7000 Pascal suction, Wi-Fi connectivity, and up to 4 hours of runtime, covering both sweeping and mopping.

name: FORBES SMARTCLEAN with AUTO BIN S2
description: A premium robotic vacuum with an auto-empty bin and an exceptional 9000 Pascal suction power. With up to 5 hours of runtime and smart Wi-Fi control, it ensures effortless, hands-free cleaning.

name: FORBES TORNADO VAC
description: A powerful 1200W canister vacuum cleaner delivering 24 kPa of suction power. It features a 4-stage cyclonic HEPA filtration system and a large 2.5-liter dust capacity for thorough home cleaning.

name: AQUAGUARD SELECT WATER SOFTENER AWS 5000
description: A high-capacity water softener utilizing Ionic-Transfer Technology to tackle water hardness up to 2100 ppm. It delivers a maximum flow rate of 3000 LPH and yields 5000 liters between regenerations.

name: AQUAGUARD SELECT WATER SOFTENER AWS 7500
description: Designed for larger homes, this water softener handles up to 2200 ppm hardness with a robust 4000 LPH flow rate. It efficiently provides 7500 liters of soft water per regeneration cycle.

name: AQUAGUARD SELECT WATER SOFTENER I 2500
description: A compact and efficient water softening solution ideal for input hardness up to 1900 ppm. It offers a 2100 LPH flow rate and provides 2500 liters of soft water before requiring regeneration.
